title: galium commune var. collinum
intro: Galium commune var. collinum, also known as Wood Sorrel or Collin's Bedstraw, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as urinary tract infections, digestive issues, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Galium commune var. collinum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve kidney function, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Galium commune var. collinum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed internally or used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
